title: Catwalks 'n dogwalks
body:
dogwalks not actually included.
![some of the catwalks in the mod, placed around as a demonstration.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/969223ea32fe9f73a09f94b83b1924f752e92b12_0.webp)

this mod adds a few decorational catwalks, coming in
- -Metal
- -Modern
- -Modern Yellow
- -Modern Orange
- -Modern 2(glass)
- -Modern 2 Yellow
- -Modern 2 Orange

every catwalk shape is a different block because, well, I'm not the best at making mods.
![A screenshot of the inventory, showing the blocks this mod contains.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2e78e9280009b09617276f05ee018c6aed97037f.png)

The catwalks currently do not act like fences, as in they can be jumped over. this is intentional, as they are meant for decoration and not used as actual fences.

porting to fabric or earlier versions are currently not planned, as there are other catwalks mods in other versions that do the job much better.
